Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Automatic Stay
Off Calendar Nov-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Stephanie Pengilley, Esq. 619-436-1826 Pengilley Myers APC for Plaintiff.
Bradley Anderson, Esq. 714-726-6518 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani for Defendant.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested/Discussed. Mr. Anderson inquires re submission of the response. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SUNRUN INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Request For Automatic Stay.

Defendant Sunrun Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is denied.

See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.

Prevailing party to prepare a proposed form of order which repeats the Court's ruling verbatim.
Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
